name: brand-forge
description: Build and evaluate brands grounded in cultural authority — strategy, identity, voice, and stewardship — across three working seats: an aspirational Muse (the gravitational pull toward an ideal, a provocation, or a guiding concept), the maker Team (the methodology's roles), and an adversarial named-critic Council (review). Modes are typed commands (/brand-build, /brand-muse, /brand-elicit, /brand-score, /brand-council, /brand-orient, /brand-stamp, /brand-stack, /brand-corpus-export); the council runs as 14 parallel isolated critic agents + an orchestrator, the Muse as a generative agent, and a Copywriter as an isolated maker agent for extended voice work; methodology/evaluation/corpus/guidelines knowledge are skills (brand-guidelines builds a guidelines section by a guided 2×2 elicitation loop, validated by bin/guidelines-ledger); a brand-corpus MCP gives per-instance retrieval; and an advisory brand-lint hook surfaces structural smells on prose artifact writes (it never blocks). Self-contained.

corpus_dir.title: Brand corpus directory
corpus_dir.description: Path to this brand's corpus (documents, tokens, strategy files) for the brand-corpus MCP. Optional — leave unset to run methodology, evaluation, and council without live corpus retrieval.
